deals.name: Golden Boot Jackpot
deals.mechanic: Biggest recharge of the day wins a multiplier bonus. Score the biggest. Win the boot.

deals.name: Hat Trick Bonus
deals.mechanic: 3 recharges during match window = stacked bonus. Three times. Three wins.

deals.name: Penalty Kick Free Spin
deals.mechanic: Share referral code REF-QUARTERFINAL-847, friend joins = both get a free spin bonus. Pass it. They score. You both win.

deals.name: Halftime Reload
deals.mechanic: Mystery midnight drop for all active players. The second half always surprises.

act_1.name: THE OPENING
act_1.concept: Quarterfinal Friday kicks off. Lady E in referee dress blows the gold whistle — the game is ON at Lady E Luck. Launch energy, World Cup excitement, introduce theme.

posts.concept: Lady E blows a gold whistle — golden coins explode from the blast. Stadium lights flood the frame. Text-free cinematic opener.
posts.caption_hook: Match day at Lady E Luck. The quarterfinals just got golden. 🥇

posts.concept: Lady E standing on a field of dark emerald turf, gold spotlights overhead, gold whistle on chain, arms wide, commanding presence.
posts.caption_hook: Friday. Quarterfinals. Golden Boot Jackpot. Today we play for keeps.

posts.concept: Golden Boot Jackpot announcement. Boot made of gold, coins spilling from it.
posts.caption_hook: 🥇 GOLDEN BOOT JACKPOT — Biggest recharge today wins the multiplier bonus. All day.

act_2.name: THE WELCOME
act_2.concept: New Player Bonus launches. Lucky Lou arrives in his soccer jersey, hyped for match day. Community welcome energy — everyone belongs here.
act_2.character_focus: Lucky Lou (World Cup Variant) + Lady E

posts.concept: Lady E extends a gloved hand toward the viewer, warm welcoming smile, stadium gold light behind her. Lucky Lou peeks from the side in his soccer jersey giving two thumbs up.
posts.caption_hook: New here? Your welcome bonus is waiting. Lady E Luck — where every player is a VIP from day one.

posts.concept: Lucky Lou running onto emerald field in his soccer jersey, arms out, clover in hand, giant smile.
posts.caption_hook: Lucky Lou says: First time? Your bonus is already scored. Come on in. 🍀

posts.concept: Soccer ball morphing mid-spin into a golden casino chip, slow-motion, gold dust.
posts.caption_hook: ⚽ → 🎰 Every spin is a goal at Lady E Luck. Quarterfinal energy ALL day.

act_3.name: THE GOLDEN RUSH
act_3.concept: Match kicks off at 3PM ET. Hat Trick Bonus is live. Referral push. Golden Dealer makes an appearance — silent, commanding. Deals stacking as match heats up.

posts.concept: Lucky Lou in soccer jersey spinning a giant golden wheel on an emerald field. Wheel stops on BONUS. He celebrates like he scored a goal.
posts.caption_hook: The Daily Bonus Wheel is spinning. It resets at midnight — don't let your spin go to waste. 🔄

posts.concept: Three gold soccer balls lined up on a penalty spot, each morphing into a stack of gold coins. Dark emerald background, cinematic gold lighting.
posts.caption_hook: HAT TRICK BONUS ⚽⚽⚽ — 3 recharges between 1PM–6PM = stacked bonus. Three times. Three wins.

posts.concept: Two golden soccer boots side by side on emerald turf, each boot glowing. One boot for you, one for your friend.
posts.caption_hook: Pass it like a pro. Share code REF-QUARTERFINAL-847 — your friend joins, you BOTH score a free spin bonus.

posts.concept: Golden Dealer holds up three fingers from behind a shadowed visor. Three gold chips materialize in his palm.
posts.caption_hook: Three charges. Three wins. Hat Trick Bonus ends at 6PM. ⏱️

act_4.name: JACKPOT PARADE
act_4.concept: Match is over. Celebration energy peaks. Community wins showcased. Daily Bonus reminder — urgent. Lady E leads the victory lap.

posts.concept: Lady E in referee dress holding a glowing golden clock. Coins raining around her. Urgency.
posts.caption_hook: ⏰ DAILY BONUS — Still unclaimed? It resets at midnight. Go get it now.

posts.concept: A golden soccer boot trophy on a pedestal, surrounded by gold coins, emerald green spotlight above. Cinematic, luxury, aspirational.
posts.caption_hook: 🥇 Golden Boot Jackpot is still running. Who's topping the leaderboard today? Drop a 🥾 if you're in the game.

posts.concept: Lady E and the Summer Crew celebrating on emerald turf, confetti in gold and green, everyone arms raised.
posts.caption_hook: The community is WINNING today 🏆 Drop your W in the comments — big wins, small wins, all wins count.

posts.concept: Montage-style reel — Lucky Lou doing a goal celebration (knee slide), Lady E raising a gold trophy, Golden Dealer placing a final gold chip. Afrobeats soundtrack cue.
posts.caption_hook: This is what Quarterfinal Friday looks like at Lady E Luck. Golden energy all day. 🥇 #MatchDay #GoldenBoot

act_5.name: GOLDEN HOUR
act_5.concept: Halftime Reload mystery drop goes live. Lucky Lou finally wins big — his signature arc complete. Tomorrow teased. Premium late-night energy.

posts.concept: Lucky Lou at midnight, stadium lights off except one gold spotlight on him. He checks his phone — eyes go wide — drops of gold coins fall from above.
posts.caption_hook: 🌙 Halftime Reload just dropped. Mystery bonus — active players only. Check. Your. Account.

posts.concept: Lucky Lou on his knees, arms to the sky, under a shower of gold coins, soccer jersey glowing gold in the light. The underdog WINS.
posts.caption_hook: He almost didn't make it today. Then the Golden Hour hit. Lucky Lou wins AGAIN. 🍀🏆

posts.concept: Lady E walks toward camera in slow motion, golden whistle swinging, half-smiling. She stops, holds up one finger. Slow fade to black. Whisper voiceover.
posts.caption_hook: Tomorrow. Something golden is coming. Stay close. 👑

song_of_the_day.title: Golden Kick
song_of_the_day.instruments: 808 bass, live percussion (talking drum layer), brass hits, synth pads, stadium crowd swell, gold-coin SFX integrated as percussion

intro: Lady E Luck, we playing for gold tonight
Quarterfinal Friday — every kick, every spin, every light
verse_1: Rise up, it's the golden hour
Turf is green, the crown is ours
Hat trick coming, watch it flower
Lucky Lou he put his boots on
Dealer laid the chips and moved on
Fortune Friday — play your truth song
pre_chorus: Lady E Luck — steal the show
chorus: Score big, rise up, we riding till midnight
Lady E Luck — where every Friday's a highlight
verse_2: Penalty spot, one chip in the net
Biggest recharge — you win, don't forget
Pass the code, let your people in
They score a bonus, you both win
Lady E Luck — can't stop the spin
bridge: From the opening whistle to the golden hour
We built this for the ones who know their power
Not about the rush — it's the community we grow
Every Friday night — we putting on a show
Lucky Lou said — 'I almost missed it'
Lady E said — 'Baby, you were gifted'
Golden Dealer smiled — the table shifted
final_chorus: Score big, rise up, we riding till midnight
Lady E Luck — where every Friday's a highlight
outro: Stay close... the second half always surprises...
Lady E Luck... playing for gold...
